home.title: AS4 Gas Nomination Grid
home.intro: Explore the production-inspired editable grid for capturing weekly gas nominations. Adjust the resolution, switch direction, and play with URL sharing support.

grid.leadTimeNotice: Cells before {time} are locked due to the {hours}h lead time.
grid.noSelection: Select one or more editable cells to enable bulk fill.
grid.invalidValue: Enter a whole number between 0 and {max}.
